routes._comment: Homepage of DGEP — most-complained category on fara-hartie.gov.ro per SITES_COVERAGE.md sec 3.2 (300+ reports in <30 days). Tech: WordPress + Bootstrap 4 theme "template cms". Stable hooks: section.main, header.header, nav#main-menu, ul#menu-primary-menu, article#post-NNNN.article. The four orange CTA cards under the carousel are the most important elements (Cartea Electronica, Programare CEI, Servicii MAI, Aplicatii CEI) — pensioner persona must surface those first. Selector source: direct fetch of https://dgep.mai.gov.ro/ on 2026-05-02 (74KB).

extract._comment: Page brand — both the MAI logo and the institution name are inside header.header. We surface the institution-name <a> which sits at .text-depabd > a. Class .text-depabd is bespoke to this site.
Search form — top-right of the header. Bootstrap class .search-field is stable.
Top navigation — ul#menu-primary-menu is the WordPress-generated primary menu. We collect top-level <li> > <a> children only.

Hero CTA cards — the four orange action cards directly under the carousel. They are the highest-priority calls-to-action (Cartea Electronica, Programare CEI, Servicii electronice MAI, Aplicatii CEI). Selector targets the bg-warning anchor inside .card-body within section.main. The .bg-warning class is the only thing distinguishing CTAs from regular link cards.
Latest announcements — every WordPress post in the homepage feed is wrapped in <article id="post-NNNN" class="article ...">. We collect the headline anchors inside h5.card-title.
Carousel slides — the homepage carousel #custom-carousel. We surface its top-level item count via div.carousel-item, useful for the journalist persona that wants the news rotation visible inline.

pensioner._comment: Pensioner — DGEP's CEI / appointment booking is the most-complained gov flow on fara-hartie. Strip everything that isn't a CTA. Hide carousel and primary-nav (overwhelming), surface hero-cta cards as one-tap-per-screen tiles. Emphasize the appointment booking CTA.

routes._comment: Servicii / Evidenta Persoanelor category page — the appointment-flow landing per task spec. Same theme, different layout (WordPress category archive). Top of page renders an <h3> category title; a subnav of related services (#post-navigate); article body in .ajax-content. Selector source: direct fetch of https://dgep.mai.gov.ro/category/servicii/evidenta-persoanelor/ on 2026-05-02 (49KB).

extract._comment: Category title — <h3 class="font-weight-bold"> inside header.pt-5.mb-4.border-bottom inside section.main. The category name lives here.
Service sub-navigation — #post-navigate contains the related-service quick-links (Cadru Legal, Documente Necesare, Formulare, etc.). Each link has a stable data-postid attribute.
Service description body — .ajax-content holds the WordPress article body for this category. Pure paragraph extraction.
Primary navigation — same site-wide menu as homepage.
Cross-category list — sidebar links to other services. We collect from the footer Categorii section.

pensioner._comment: Pensioner appointment flow — the entire screen reduces to: title, the service description, and one-tap subnav buttons. Hide everything else.
